## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aftershoot and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming audit plans.](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two articles ready for review; six more in progress; 10 new outlines awaiting approval](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [GrowthX conducting internal audit next week to optimize workflows and tools](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Meenakshi Nautiyal introduced as new SEO expert joining Aftershoot team](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Current content performance trending positively; team aims to double production/publication rate](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Status

  - [Two articles ready for review: "Black and White Family Photos" and "Butterfly Lighting"](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Six more articles in progress, with a couple expected to be delivered tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [10 new outlines added to the spreadsheet for Aftershoot's review](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [David plans to create 10 more outlines next week to maintain pace](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

### GrowthX Internal Audit

  - [Scheduled for next week](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Focus on optimizing workflows, tools, and processes](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Developing proprietary product to replace AirOps for improved efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Jacob working on conversion data analysis and new performance dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [No new article deliveries during audit week, but outline creation will continue](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)

### Performance Metrics and Reporting

  - [Current metrics show positive trends: impressions and clicks growing week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Average position for most articles in top 20](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Team to improve reporting with:](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Week-over-week and month-over-month comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [Keyword data integration from SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
      - [Query data to understand traffic drivers and SERP features](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
      - [Integration with Aftershoot's traffic data from PostHog](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)

### Aftershoot Team Updates

  - [Meenakshi Nautiyal introduced as new SEO expert](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Will focus on:](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [Reviewing keyword clusters and search intent alignment](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
      - [Analyzing outlines for SEO potential](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [Evaluating on-page SEO elements (structured data, schema, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Meenakshi to provide document outlining desired metrics and insights for reporting](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### Keyword Strategy Refinement

  - [Current keyword list not fully aligned with search intent and ICP](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Focus on balancing search volume with relevance and competition](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [Aim for mix of lower-volume, highly-targeted keywords and some higher-volume terms](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Prioritize keywords likely to drive meaningful traffic and engagement, not just impressions](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aftershoot to provide access to PostHog for traffic data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [GrowthX to incorporate new metrics and insights into performance reporting](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Meenakshi to create document outlining desired metrics and reporting structure](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine keyword strategy based on Meenakshi's input](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Teams to share any findings or roadblocks during the audit process](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Next meeting scheduled in two weeks to discuss audit results and new strategies](https://fathom.video/share/KEVir3HuUrMyKuXHRs2_LRdZC8-5GfYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
